title: Player Head Drops
description: Drop player heads when exploded by a charged Creeper or player
body:
Player Head Drops

Players will drop their head when killed by a charged Creeper or a slim chance when killed by a Player, alternative pack for dropping a head only when killed by a charged Creeper

Features

  • Player heads will drop when killed by a charged Creeper. Player heads have a rare chance of being dropped when killed by another player
  • Alternate version for drops ONLY from charged Creepers
  • Adds rare chance of finding player heads in loot chests
